pageContext.name: Ultramarines Primaris Inceptors
pageContext.description: 'We are the Ultramarines, the sons of Guilliman. Whilst we draw breath, we stand. Whilst we stand, we fight. Whilst we fight, we prevail. Nothing shall stay our wrath.'  — Marneus Calgar, Chapter Master of the Ultramarines  Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to bring you the Ultramarines Primaris Inceptors Collectible Set!  This heavy-assault close support Inceptor squad is brought to life in detailed 1:18 scale for fans of the acclaimed war game, Warhammer 40K. Spearheading the attacks, these swift fighters deliver crushing blows that make way for waves of comrades to drive home the attack. Included with the Inceptor set are floating stands that mimic the characteristic drop-ability of these skilled soldiers as they jet towards their objectives like missiles.  Warhammer 40k fans, be sure to drop the Inceptors into your collection today!
